quote: In a world of overwhelming automation, they are the light!

When it comes to matters of the star known as Siosm, the empires of the cosmos look to inspiration. It is said that even John Bazzite pays tribute to the star of the atomic universe. The number of stars in the sky, uncountable.
context: Treatise: The Cosmos — Volume 3 (Blue Universal Red Letter Edition)

quote: Under NO CIRCUMSTANCE let the stupid one manage secrets.
And the people, enslaved by the Toilmaster under the boot of John Bazzite, suffered.
context: HISTORY: The Chronicles of Blue Universal

quote: I can understand your fear that the traditions and cultures of little countries will be overwhelmed when the world state arrives. But you are wrong: it is useless to cling to the past. Even before they came, the sovereign state was dying. They have merely hastened its end.

The end of strife and conflict of all kinds had also meant the virtual end of creative art. There were myriads of performers, amateur and professional, yet there had been no really outstanding new works of literature, music, painting, or sculpture for a generation. The world was still living on the glories of a past that could never return.
It is a bitter thought, but you must face it. The planets you may one day possess. But the stars are not for man.

The universe was vast, but that fact terrified him less than its mystery. Jorge was not a person who thought deeply on such matters, yet it sometimes seemed to him that men were like children amusing themselves in some secluded playground, protected from the fierce realities of the outer world.
In the space of a few days, humanity had lost its future, for the heart of any race is destroyed, and its will to survive is utterly broken, when its children are taken from it.
